design_philosophy.vibe: Playful & bouncy, handcrafted, local, warm and inviting. No generic AI-slop, no standard corporate tech feel. Every interaction should feel tactile and springy.
anti_patterns_avoided: No native radio buttons or checkboxes
No purple or teal generic gradients

accent.description: Dusty Pink / Soft Peach - playful secondary highlights

buttons.primary: bg-[#E06D53] text-[#FAF7F2] font-heading font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full border-2 border-[#2D2424] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#2D2424] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#2D2424] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#89A894] text-[#FAF7F2] font-heading font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full border-2 border-[#2D2424] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#2D2424] transition-all

segmented_control.container: relative flex bg-[#FAF7F2] p-2 rounded-full border-2 border-[#2D2424]
segmented_control.item: relative z-10 flex-1 text-center py-3 px-6 font-bold cursor-pointer transition-colors
segmented_control.active_bg_classes: absolute inset-0 bg-[#F2D8C9] rounded-full border-2 border-[#2D2424] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#2D2424]

pill_toggle.base: px-6 py-3 rounded-full border-2 border-[#2D2424] font-bold cursor-pointer transition-all

stepper.button: w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-[#2D2424] bg-white text-2xl font-black shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#2D2424] cursor-pointer
stepper.value_display: text-3xl font-heading font-black text-[#2D2424] min-w-[2ch] text-center

card.base: bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#2D2424] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#2D2424]

header.layout: Sticky top, glassmorphism background, logo left, nav center, CTA right.
header.interactions: Nav links have playful underline drawing on hover.

hero.layout: Overlapping asymmetric elements. Massive headline. Hand-drawn SVG squiggles and paw-prints in the background.
hero.content: Headline: 'Clean Home. Happy Paws.' Subtext: Decatur & East Atlanta's most trusted care. CTA: 'Book a Visit'.

services_bento.layout: CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Asymmetric spans.
services_bento.items: 8 services (General Cleaning, Deep Cleaning, Organizing, Garages & Sheds, Dog Walking, Pet Sitting, Feeding & Care, Playtime & Enrichment).
services_bento.interactions: Hover causes card to tilt slightly and an icon (e.g., wagging tail or sparkles) to animate.

eta_calculator.features: Input field for address. Custom submit button. Result panel reveals via Framer Motion with Distance, ETA today, and Zone Tier Badge.
eta_calculator.logic: Standard (0-7 miles), +$20 (7-13 miles), Out of Range (>13 miles).

why_us.layout: Row of stats/badges. 5★ Rating, Fully Insured, Pet-Safe Products, Same Caregiver.

testimonials.layout: Marquee strip of cards scrolling infinitely.
testimonials.style: Cards have quote marks and customer name + pet name.

booking_form.layout: Multi-step interactive experience wrapped in a large playful card.

footer.layout: Wavy top border separating it from the rest of the page. Large friendly goodbye message, contact info.

media.icons_strategy: Use 'lucide-react' for crisp vectors, but wrap them in circular backgrounds with the playful border and shadow to match the bento style.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Framer Motion extensively for micro-interactions (bouncy scales on hover/tap, springy layouts).
Do NOT use standard Shadcn form components (no Select, no Checkbox). Build the custom SegmentedControl, PillToggle, and Stepper components from scratch as defined in 'components_specs'.
Ensure Bricolage Grotesque and Nunito fonts are imported from Google Fonts.
Add 'lucide-react' icons and potentially 'react-fast-marquee' for the testimonials.

Implement the ETA calculator with a mock distance generation logic based on the user's string input (since there's no actual Google Maps API integrated). E.g., parse length of string or generate a pseudo-random distance based on input length, then calculate tier and time.
Apply `data-testid` to everything that moves or clicks.
Ensure the custom border shadows (`4px_4px_0px_#2D2424`) are used to give that solid, handcrafted retro-playful feel.
